task.label: Notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

conditions.condition: In the case of a personal data breach

exception.description: unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

task.label: Accompany the notification with reasons for the delay

conditions.condition: IF the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours
after becoming aware of a personal data breach

task.label: Provide the information in phases without undue further delay

conditions.condition: IF, and in so far as, it is not possible to provide the information at the same time

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: When the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: if the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures, and those measures were applied to the personal data affected
if the controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects is no longer likely to materialise
if the communication would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Inform data subjects via public communication or similar measure

conditions.condition: if the communication would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Require the controller to communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: IF the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: if required by the supervisory authority

task.label: Decide that any of the conditions are met

conditions.condition: IF the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
